Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4025 0 0}It doesn't seem as though this problem will simply resolve itself. We may have to fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Don't worry. Whatever the cause may be, we'll overcome it. We've already saved the world once, after all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}That said... I'll be investigating on my own for some time. I'll leave the rest to you, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Looks like we won't have to worry about supplies now. I didn't expect us to find a solution like this, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}The Abyss of Time, huh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}They reflect the minds of those who pass through...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Then if there are other doors that lead to the past, will we witness more of our personal memories?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}What does it all mean...? And why would we be the cause of all this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4009 0 0}I apologize I was gone for so long. I'll be joining the expedition from here on out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}You've been doing well as the leader, though. I'll try my best to make up for my absence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4082 0 0}I never thought about how much of my time as a student was dedicated to finding a way to eradicate the Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}"She'll spend her prime years bound to our vile legacy"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4052 0 0}Oh, sorry. Ignore that. It's just something I heard once, when I was younger.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}Amada's, then Akihiko's, and now Iori's past...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}And each event took place before they started fighting Shadows... Is that how they're all related?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Is it linked to the "reason" that will help us get rid of the Abyss of Time...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}We still don't know what that figure's motive could be... I can't deny it's been weighing on my mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}But our current objective is to explore the Abyss of Time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}We should keep moving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4083 0 0}I vowed to protect my father... But I couldn't even manage that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 52 -1 0 0}Every time I want to protect someone... I lose them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}...But no longer, not anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4143 0 0}Aigis, would you lend me your strength?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}Yukari seems to believe you inherited your new Persona abilities from him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}What do you think, Aigis? Is it possible?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}Well... All I wanted to say is that Yukari's words may have had an edge to them, but she doesn't mean you any malice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}She lost her temper since he meant so much to her... But I suppose he meant just as much to you as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4055 0 0}Apologies, I didn't intend to distress you. I'm sure Yukari didn't mean any ill will toward you, either, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}You are the only one who heard his final words... She must be taking it especially hard.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}Sorry, I know this couldn't have been easy on you, either, but I only wanted you to understand where she's coming from.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4052 0 0}Sorry if I troubled you. I'll talk to Yukari when I get the chance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4082 0 0}Just as I said earlier... I will be joining Yukari in this fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}I'm sorry it turned out this way. I know it's irresponsible of me to choose sides after appointing you as our leader...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 52 -1 0 0}But I won't budge on this... That's why there's no need for you to hold back. Come at us with everything you have.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4038 0 0}Thank you for stepping up as the leader... You've done well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}We may have fractured at one point, but you're the reason why we're all together again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}You have my gratitude. I apologize for giving you such a heavy burden.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 52 -1 0 0}There's something I need to discuss with you, Aigis—about your life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 52 -1 0 0}You are one of the people I want to protect. That's why, next time... You can come to me for anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}I was thinking about taking a short break. Would you like to join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend time with Mitsuru-san...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4038 0 0}Thank you. I thought it would've been rather dull if it were just me alone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}I see. Well, let me know if you ever need the company.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4009 0 0}Oh, Aigis. Koromaru wanted me to play with him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Since we came across that {f 4 4 0 37 1 16781} in the Abyss, I thought I'd indulge him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Would you care to join us?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}Then shall we get going? Koromaru ought to be waiting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}I see. Perhaps another time, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4013 0 0}Yes? What is it? Did you want to play with Koromaru?[n]{f 1 1}
